steps.t: Baldnoth can be found outside the Mead Hall of Snowbourn. Gísling believes the guards of the city can aid you in assisting the new inhabitants.
Empty homes can be found throughout Snowbourn and are near the city's major services. Baldnoth mentioned that he would have the guards free space for …
Various homes about Snowbourn have been condensed by the guards. Now that you have found their locations, you should send the refugees to their new sh…
Gísling can be found north-east of the Mead Hall of Snowbourn. You should return to Gísling and let him know that you have done as he asked.
